# Crown & Canvas

> Premium AI-generated pet portrait artwork. Transform your pet photo into royal, military, and fantasy portrait art.

## About

Crown & Canvas transforms pet photos into stunning AI-generated portrait artwork. Choose from 20+ artistic styles across Renaissance, Military, Royalty, Fantasy, and Modern themes. Available as digital downloads, gallery-wrapped canvas prints, and luxury framed prints.

## Products

- Digital Download: $29.99 (high-res JPG + PNG, 300 DPI)
- Premium Canvas: $59.99-$89.99 (gallery-wrapped, ready to hang)
- Luxury Framed: $99.99-$149.99 (museum-quality wood frame, UV glass)

## Portrait Styles

- Renaissance: King, Queen, Scholar, Duke
- Military: General, Admiral, Colonel, Ace Pilot
- Royalty: Emperor, Empress, Prince, Princess
- Fantasy: Wizard, Knight, Dragon Rider
- Modern: Astronaut, Superhero, Chef, DJ, Cowboy

## How It Works

1. Upload your pet photo
2. Choose a portrait style
3. Select product tier and size
4. Receive your custom portrait artwork

## Add-Ons

- Rush Processing (3-5 days): +$14.99
- Premium Gift Wrapping: +$9.99
